title: Ohm's Law Teacher Notes
content: Introduce V = I x R, then run two worked examples using measured current and resistance.

title: Series Circuits Notes
content: Focus on current consistency in series paths and total resistance summation.

title: Parallel Circuits Notes
content: Demonstrate equal voltage across branches and current splitting by branch resistance.

title: Kirchhoff's Laws Notes
content: Use one node and one loop example. Emphasize sign conventions when summing voltages.

title: Power and Energy Notes
content: Cover P = V x I and E = P x t with practical appliance rating examples.

title: Multimeter Use Notes
content: Set range, place leads correctly, and observe safety when switching between measurement modes.

title: Electrical Safety Notes
content: Lockout basics, safe isolation checks, and PPE reminders for lab sessions.

title: Protection Devices Notes
content: Compare MCBs, fuses, and RCD behavior in overload and fault conditions.

title: Fault Finding Notes
content: Apply a fixed troubleshooting sequence and log evidence before component replacement.

title: Switching Basics Notes
content: Introduce latching and momentary switching with relay control examples.
